pageContext.name: Crossing Paths
pageContext.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present the Crossing Paths Fine Art Print!  This Star Wars: The Mandalorian interpretive artwork by Christian Waggoner features a point-of-view perspective of The Mandalorian with his gaze set on an ever-ready Ahsoka Tano at the moment of their exciting introduction.  Limited to 195 pieces, this Giclee print is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, this Star Wars art is a must-have for fans The Mandalorian!
